THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIRD,TIMOTHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOALEM,EDWARD $1,322.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,322.00, DEFT EDWARD MOALEM'S MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART & DENIED IN PART. THE CT ORDERS THAT THE SUM OF TWO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THOUSAND ($2000) OF THE LEVIED ACCT BE TRANSMITTED TO PLFT TIMOTHY BIRD AS PARTIAL SATISFACTION OF TH JUDGMENT RENDERED 10/15/93, BY THIS CT. THE BAL OF
THE JUDGMT SHALL BE PD IN THREE MONTHY INSTALLMENT AS FOLLOWS: $400. TO BE PD ON OR BEFORE 12/15/93, $400. TO BE PD ON OR BEFORE 1/15/93, $522. PLUS
COSTS & EXPENSES TO BE PAID ON OR BEFORE 2/15/94. AFTER DISBURSING THE ABOVE REF $2000 TO PLFT, THE LEVYING AGENT OF SAN MATEO 	3-089444
